memoryArtifacts.headline: Ralph Fitzwilliam
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ralph Fitzwilliam (1256? – 11 February 1317), was a baron.

Fitzwilliam was the son of William Fitzralph of Grimthorpe in Yorkshire, and of his wife Joan, daughter of Thomas de Greystock. He was proba …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Fitzwilliam於1256年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe52歲，母親Joan de Greystoke42歲。他於1281年11月1日與Margery De Boldebec結婚。他去世於1317年2月11日在英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可享年61歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆亞善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Fitzwilliam于1256年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe52岁，母亲Joan de Greystoke42岁。他于1281年11月1日与Margery De Boldebec结婚。他去世于1317年2月11日在英国英格兰波藍德格斯托可享年61岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆亞善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzwilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Fitzwilliam was born in 1256, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe, was 52 and his mother, Joan de Greystoke, was 42. He married Margery De Boldebec on 1 November 1281. He died on 11 February 1317, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Neasham, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Fitzwilliam est né en 1256, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Joan de Greystoke, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margery De Boldebec le 1 novembre 1281. Il est décédé le 11 février 1317, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Neasham, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Fitzwilliam 1256 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe 52 und seine Mutter Joan de Greystoke 42. Er hat am 1. November 1281 Margery De Boldebec geheiratet. Er starb am 11. Februar 1317 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Neasham, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Fitzwilliam è nato il nel 1256 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Greystoke, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Margery De Boldebec il 1 novembre 1281. Morì il 11 febbraio 1317, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Neasham, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Fitzwilliamが1256年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpeは52歳，母Joan de Greystokeは42歳であった。1281年11月1日にMargery De Boldebecと結婚した。彼は1317年2月11日にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで61歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムネアシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Fitzwilliam(이)가 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Greystoke(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1281년 11월 1일 Margery De Boldebec(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1317년 2월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 니아샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Fitzwilliam nasceu em 1256, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Greystoke, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery De Boldebec em 1 de novembro de 1281. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1317, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Neasham, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Fitzwilliam родился в 1256 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Greystoke, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery De Boldebec 1 ноября 1281 г. Он умер 11 февраля 1317 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности нишам, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Fitzwilliam nació en 1256, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William II fitz Ralph of Grimethorpe, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Joan de Greystoke, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Margery De Boldebec el 1 de noviembre de 1281. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1317, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Neasham, Durham, Inglaterra.
